summary: Tested homepage redesign, security features (rate limiting, CORS), and paylink validation. HomePage UI looks excellent on desktop and mobile. Rate limiting works but is unreliable due to multi-worker in-memory storage. CORS restriction is overridden by Kubernetes ingress proxy returning wildcard *.

critical.issue: CORS headers return wildcard '*' instead of restricted origin. The FastAPI CORS middleware config (CORS_ORIGINS env var) is correct but Kubernetes ingress/proxy layer overrides with 'access-control-allow-origin: *'. The security fix has no effect at the app level.

Rate limiting is in-memory per worker process. With multiple workers, each worker has separate _rate_buckets. 12 requests from same IP returned alternating 401/429 (2 workers observed). Rate limiting is not consistent — attacker can bypass by hitting different workers. Confirmed from curl test: attempts 1,3,8,9 returned 401 while others returned 429.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (returns 404). Minor - not a blocking issue.

issues: All elements working correctly - title حُجّة clear, navbar has الأسعار with gold border, الإدارة link visible, دخول and حساب جديد buttons in top-right, العب الحين works and navigates to /mode

action_items: CORS: The Kubernetes ingress is overriding CORS with wildcard *. Need to remove CORS headers from ingress/nginx config level, or configure ingress to pass-through FastAPI CORS headers. The app-level fix alone is insufficient.

Rate Limiting: Replace in-memory _rate_buckets with Redis-backed rate limiting (e.g., slowapi with Redis backend) to work correctly across multiple workers. OR configure uvicorn to run single worker for this feature.
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiting uses defaultdict(list) in memory - NOT production-safe with multiple workers. Use Redis or a shared store.
CORS fix is correctly coded in server.py but ingress proxy overrides it - infrastructure fix needed.
Admin token (role=admin) is rejected by require_user dependency - paylink/verify endpoint not accessible to admins for testing/support purposes (may be intentional but worth noting).

success_rate.backend: 40% (4/10 pass - login register/invalid work, paylink injection prevented, but CORS+rate limit unreliable)

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed user created via /api/auth/register during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HomePage redesign is complete and working perfectly. Security features have infrastructure-level issues: 1) CORS wildcard from ingress proxy overrides FastAPI restrictions, 2) In-memory rate limiting is per-worker so unreliable with multiple workers. Admin credentials: username=admin, password=hujjah2024. Login uses email field not username.

cors_wildcard.issue: CORS returns * despite correct FastAPI config
cors_wildcard.root_cause: Kubernetes ingress/nginx layer adds its own CORS headers (access-control-allow-origin: *) before response reaches client, overriding FastAPI's CORSMiddleware
cors_wildcard.mitigation: Configure nginx/ingress to NOT add CORS headers (remove cors annotations), let FastAPI handle it. Or add ingress CORS config with specific origins.

rate_limiting_inconsistent.issue: Rate limiting alternates 401/429 from same client
rate_limiting_inconsistent.root_cause: In-memory _rate_buckets dict is per-process. Multiple uvicorn workers each maintain separate dictionaries. Load balancer distributes requests across workers so each worker only sees ~N/workers requests.
rate_limiting_inconsistent.reproduction: Send 12 consecutive login attempts - some workers hit limit, others don't
rate_limiting_inconsistent.mitigation: Use Redis for rate limiting storage (slowapi library with Redis backend), or run single worker process
